zh.Hereford, Herefordshire, England: 英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice De Grandison於大約1240年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德時，她的父親Pierre I Sire De Grandison52歲，母親Agnes Neufchâtel32歲。她於1260年與Baron Devereux of Lyonshall William Devereux在英國賀福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1308年在英國英格蘭賀福爾享年69歲。

zh-hans.Hereford, Herefordshire, England: 英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice De Grandison于大约1240年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德时，她的父亲Pierre I Sire De Grandison52岁，母亲Agnes Neufchâtel32岁。她于1260年与Baron Devereux of Lyonshall William Devereux在英国賀福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1308年在英国英格兰賀福爾享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grandison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): said to be a habitational name from Granson on Lake Neuchâtel (Switzerland).

History: The first known bearer of this surname is Rigaldus de Grancione (flourished 1040). The name was taken to Britain by Otes de Grandison (died 1328) and his brother. They were among a group of Savoyards who settled in England when Henry III married a granddaughter of the Count of Savoy.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice De Grandison was born about 1240, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Pierre I Sire De Grandison, was 52 and her mother, Agnes Neufchâtel, was 32. She married Baron Devereux of Lyonshall William Devereux in 1260, in Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1308, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice De Grandison est née environ 1240, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Pierre I Sire De Grandison, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Agnes Neufchâtel, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Baron Devereux of Lyonshall William Devereux en 1260, à Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1308, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice De Grandison um 1240 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Pierre I Sire De Grandison 52 und ihre Mutter Agnes Neufchâtel 32. Sie hat 1260 in Herefordshire, England Baron Devereux of Lyonshall William Devereux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1308 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice De Grandison è nata il circa 1240 nel Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Pierre I Sire De Grandison, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, Agnes Neufchâtel, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Baron Devereux of Lyonshall William Devereux nel 1260, nel Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1308, nel Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice De Grandisonが約1240年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで生まれた時，父Pierre I Sire De Grandisonは52歳，母Agnes Neufchâtelは32歳であった。1260年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでBaron Devereux of Lyonshall William Devereuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1308年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice De Grandison(이)가 대략 1240년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Pierre I Sire De Grandison(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Neufchâtel(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1260년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 Baron Devereux of Lyonshall William Devereux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1308년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice De Grandison nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Pierre I Sire De Grandison, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Neufchâtel, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Baron Devereux of Lyonshall William Devereux em 1260, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1308, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice De Grandison родилась около 1240 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Pierre I Sire De Grandison было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Neufchâtel, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Baron Devereux of Lyonshall William Devereux в 1260 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1308 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice De Grandison nació aproximadamente 1240, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Pierre I Sire De Grandison, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Agnes Neufchâtel, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Baron Devereux of Lyonshall William Devereux en 1260, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1308, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años.
